causalAutopsy.notes: main gained the keyword-intent classification-ratchet family when the move-intent exemplar (PR #1367) merged; rebasing this conversion onto it requires registering HubIntentClassifier (a new COMPONENT_CATEGORY key) across every classification map, mirroring #1367 MoveIntentClassifier, and decrementing the keyword-intent-decision baseline 5->4 for the now-converted hubCommands.
